name: VAY ChMeetings Member Portal contract baseline

articles.title: Builder Cards List & Guide
requiredPhrases: The Text/HTML Card lets you format text, add images or add HTML code
A link card allows you to link to anything on the web
This card allows you to embed ChMeetings forms on your page

articles.title: Manage Content
requiredPhrases: The Builder is split into three columns
Only those who are logged into an app account can see the card
You can share pages with anyone online using direct links

articles.title: How can I add my own design to specific app sections?
requiredPhrases: not open to section-specific custom design

articles.title: Get To Know The Member Portal Builder
requiredPhrases: The Member Portal is available on both the desktop and mobile app

articles.title: Website Integration
requiredPhrases: does not yet provide direct integration with any website-building platform
You can embed Events to your website
Forms can be embedded into your website

articles.title: Configure The Member Portal Appearance
requiredPhrases: These settings will apply to the desktop and mobile versions of your Member Portal
Settings Exclusively Available With the Branded App

articles.title: Configure the Member Portal
requiredPhrases: merge fields at the top of the text editor
Sports Fest Facility and Safety Notice

manualChecks: Open the tenant root in a fresh browser and confirm the JavaScript login redirect and account-creation path.
Use an ordinary member account to verify the real Member home, URL, permissions, and direct-link return behavior.
Compare Guest and Member Builder previews with the corresponding published experiences.
Test the published flow on current iOS and Android ChMeetings apps, including Back/Close, keyboard, rotation, and resume.
Confirm plan and Branded App entitlements separately in every target tenant, especially VAY SM and RPC.
If custom HTML, an external app, or an iframe is planned, use a disposable Page with synthetic data and follow the architecture guide's pilot checklist.
